data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users prefer your site to work the same way as all the other sites they already know.
data.technical_spec: Consistent navigation patterns and familiar interface design.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: The time to acquire a target is a function of the distance to and size of the target.
data.technical_spec: Button sizes and placement are optimized for quick access.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: The time it takes to make a decision increases with the number and complexity of choices.
data.technical_spec: Limits the number of actions available at any given time.

data.title: Tesler’s Law
data.technical_spec: Focuses on reducing complexity in the user interface.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: The average person can only keep 7 (±2) items in their working memory.
data.technical_spec: Ensures the interface does not overload cognitive load.
